calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-06-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joscelyn Jones for and with Glen Walton (Petitioner).
Leon Ainer for and with Lamont Walton (Objector).

The Court stated that they have a lot of money that needs to be distributed and questions what the remaining issues are. Ms. Jones stated that the issue is whether the $1,500.00 offset against the distribution share of Leo Walton should be approved. Mr. Ainer stated that there is an issue with the nature of services (statutory versus extraordinary), that they would like the Court to address it, that they agree with the $1,500.00 to Mr. De Vries and that there is a $669.00 variance. Ms. Jones explained that $669.00 was recirculated back into the estate amount, that it has already been accounted for and that it is to be distributed. Mr. Ainer stated that the personal property items fall under normal statutory fees, that the property was an attractive piece of property, that it took no extraordinary effort to receive offers and that he does not believe these hours were extraordinary. The Amended First Account and Report of Executor, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Santiago. Not reported.
